prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock price volatility patterns, MRK (Merck) as a large-cap pharmaceutical stock typically exhibits moderate volatility with annualized volatility around 20-25%. Confidence intervals are calculated using standard deviation estimates scaled to the 18-day timeframe, assuming normal distribution of returns.
